feature.name: Tasks Migration Requirements
feature.description: Document task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation for FileMaker to Supabase migration

standing_constraints: DO NOT modify backend infrastructure (database schema, API endpoints) - create change request documents instead
Follow Backend Change Protocol from CLAUDE.md for any schema/API changes
Verify Supabase table existence before documenting mappings
Document current behavior accurately without making assumptions
Include code references with file paths and line numbers
Consider fixed-price project logic in financial record generation

tasks.title: Create requirements directory structure
tasks.description: Create requirements/tasks/ directory and README.md scaffold with sections for task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation
tasks.completion_notes: Directory structure already exists at requirements/tasks/ with comprehensive README.md covering task CRUD (Task Management section), timer operations (Timer Operations section), and financial record generation (Financial Record Generation section). All supporting documentation files present: current-implementation.md, data-model-mapping.md, api-contracts.md, authorization.md, migration-plan.md, acceptance-criteria.md. Total 7 files with 140KB of documentation.
tasks.implementation_notes: Confirmed the existing 'requirements/tasks/' documentation structure already satisfied TSK0001, including 'README.md' sections for task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation plus supporting specs like 'api-contracts.md' and 'acceptance-criteria.md'. Ran 'npm run build' to ensure the project still compiled and treated warnings as pre-existing. Updated '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/tasks.json' to mark TSK0001 as completed with completion metadata, then revalidated the JSON and rechecked the key README sections; no backend or implementation code changes were made.

tasks.title: Document task CRUD operations
tasks.description: Document current task create, read, update, delete operations including FileMaker field mappings, validation rules from TASK_FIELDS in taskService.js:265-305, and API calls
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive TASK_CRUD_OPERATIONS.md documentation covering all task CRUD operations, FileMaker field mappings, validation rules, timer operations, business logic, and code references. Verified Supabase does NOT have a tasks table (only automation tables exist). Documented current FileMaker-only implementation with layouts: devTasks, dapiRecords, devNotes, devLinks. Included validation schema from TASK_FIELDS (taskService.js:265-305), all CRUD flows with code references, timer lifecycle, fixed-price project logic, and migration considerations.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation for legacy FileMaker-backed task CRUD and timer behavior, including field mappings, validation rules, API request flows, and migration considerations, delivered in '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/TASK_CRUD_OPERATIONS.md'. Updated task status metadata by marking TSK0002 complete in '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' with timestamp and notes, and verified JSON validity and that the project build still compiles. Key decisions documented include treating delete as not implemented (tasks are completed instead), confirming tasks are FileMaker-only (no Supabase tasks table), and capturing timer-specific rules like fixed-price suppression of sales record creation and 6-minute adjustment increments with code references and line numbers across 'taskService.js', 'tasks.js', 'useTask.js', and 'fileMaker.js'.

tasks.title: Document timer lifecycle and state machine
tasks.description: Document timer start/stop/pause operations, state transitions, time adjustment logic (6-minute increments), and pause time tracking from TaskTimer.jsx and taskService.js
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive TIMER_LIFECYCLE_STATE_MACHINE.md documentation covering the complete timer state machine with three states (IDLE, RUNNING, PAUSED), all state transitions, pause tracking mechanism, 6-minute adjustment increments, localStorage persistence, and integration with FileMaker. Documented timer state structure, all operations (start/stop/pause/resume/adjust) with complete flow diagrams, time calculations, pause time tracking, fixed-price project logic for sales record generation, and migration considerations for Supabase. Includes detailed code references across TaskTimer.jsx, useTask.js, taskService.js, and tasks.js with specific line numbers for all key functions and state management logic.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation of the TaskTimer lifecycle and timer state machine, covering states (IDLE, RUNNING, PAUSED), all operations (start, stop, pause, resume, adjust), time and pause calculations, fixed-price billing behavior, persistence via localStorage, and migration considerations. Added the new doc file '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/TIMER_LIFECYCLE_STATE_MACHINE.md' with concrete code references to 'TaskTimer.jsx', 'useTask.js', 'taskService.js', and 'tasks.js'. Updated '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' to mark the task complete, validated JSON, and confirmed the build compiles (noting existing unrelated warnings). Key decision: keep this change purely documentation-focused with no backend or runtime behavior modifications.

tasks.title: Document financial record generation
tasks.description: Document how timer stop triggers financial record creation, fixed-price project detection (taskService.js:108-112), customer_sales insertion, and dual-write orchestration
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive FINANCIAL_RECORD_GENERATION.md documentation covering the complete financial record generation flow from timer stop through customer_sales insertion. Documented fixed-price project detection logic (taskService.js:108-112), product name formatting (CBS:Website pattern), customer lookup/creation, dual-write orchestration via dualWriteService.js, and Supabase customer_sales table schema. Verified customer_sales table structure via SSH to supabase-db. Includes complete data flow diagrams, field mappings from FileMaker devRecords to Supabase customer_sales, error handling strategies, migration considerations with 3-phase plan, edge case documentation, and two complete example flows (hourly vs fixed-price projects). Total 600+ lines of detailed documentation with code references including file paths and line numbers for all key functions across taskService.js, salesService.js, dualWriteService.js, and financialRecords.js.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation of financial record generation triggered by timer stop operations. Created '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/FINANCIAL_RECORD_GENERATION.md' with complete coverage of: (1) Architecture overview with system component diagram, (2) Step-by-step financial record creation flow from timer stop through FileMaker API calls, (3) Fixed-price project detection logic with field mapping and business rules, (4) Customer sales record creation including product name formatting (capital letters + numbers format), customer lookup/creation with organization linking, (5) Dual-write orchestration pattern with withDualWrite wrapper and timer-specific handler, (6) Complete field mappings between FileMaker devRecords and Supabase customer_sales table, (7) Migration strategy with 3 phases (dual-write, Supabase-primary, FileMaker read-only), (8) Edge cases and error scenarios (missing org ID, duplicate financial_id, customer not synced), (9) Reconciliation strategy for data consistency, and (10) Two complete example flows comparing hourly vs fixed-price project behavior. Verified Supabase customer_sales table schema via SSH database query showing UNIQUE constraint on financial_id, foreign key constraints, and complete column structure. Updated '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' to mark TSK0004 complete with detailed completion notes and metadata. No backend or implementation code changes - documentation only.
